items.title: CVE-2026-14453: This vulnerability is a critical Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) in Centreon's centreon-open-tickets module that l
items.description: This vulnerability is a critical Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) in Centreon's centreon-open-tickets module that leads to Remote Code Execution. The message_confirm field is stored without sanitization and rendered via Smarty with no security policy enabled, allowing any authenticated user, to inject and execute arbitrary code on the server. This results in disclosure of environment secrets and could impact platform availability of Centreon Infra Monitoring product.
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] CVE advisory. Risk score 9.6/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

apex.ai_summary: [P1] Vulnerability - high severity (Risk 8.0/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1190 (1 technique). 5 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: Turla (Snake / Venomous Bear). AI confidence: LOW (28%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: CRITICAL PRIORITY - Patch within 24-48 hours. Activate IR playbook. Notify SOC lead and CISO.

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-14453 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-14T13:29:00Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-14453", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-14453 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2436304; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: CVE-2026-15543: A vulnerability was found in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This impacts the function formCertListInfo of the file /goform/CertList
items.description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This impacts the function formCertListInfo of the file /goform/CertListInfo. The manipulation of the argument Name results in buffer overflow. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

items.title: CVE-2026-4769: Certain devices in the WAGO System I/O Field series activate an internal diagnostic capability during the initial startu
items.description: Certain devices in the WAGO System I/O Field series activate an internal diagnostic capability during the initial startup sequence. This functionality is not formally documented and becomes accessible without authentication for a brief period in the early boot phase. During this window, an unauthenticated remote attacker can gain access to the internal system processes, resulting in full system compromise.

items.title: CVE-2026-15544: A vulnerability was determined in Shibby Tomato up to 1.28.0000. Affected is the function getupsvar of the file www/apcu
items.description: A vulnerability was determined in Shibby Tomato up to 1.28.0000. Affected is the function getupsvar of the file www/apcupsd/tomatodata.cgi of the component apcupsd. This manipulation of the argument Field causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. This project is superseded by FreshTomato.

items.title: CVE-2026-15542: A vulnerability has been found in will-moss Isaiah up to 1.36.9. This affects an unknown function of the file app/main.g
items.description: A vulnerability has been found in will-moss Isaiah up to 1.36.9. This affects an unknown function of the file app/main.go of the component Websocket Connection Authentication. The manipulation leads to improper authentication. The attack can be initiated remotely. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance.

items.title: CVE-2026-15545: A vulnerability was identified in Shibby Tomato up to 1.28.0000. Affected by this vulnerability is the function main of
items.description: A vulnerability was identified in Shibby Tomato up to 1.28.0000. Affected by this vulnerability is the function main of the file www/apcupsd/tomatodata.cgi of the component apcupsd. Such manipulation leads to out-of-bounds write. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. This project is superseded by FreshTomato.

items.title: CVE-2026-15541: A flaw has been found in will-moss Isaiah up to 1.36.9. The impacted element is the function Server.Handle of the file a
items.description: A flaw has been found in will-moss Isaiah up to 1.36.9. The impacted element is the function Server.Handle of the file app/server/server/server.go of the component Master Websocket Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument Agent can lead to missing authorization. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance.

items.title: CVE-2026-15537: A security flaw has been discovered in SourceCodester Online Book Store System 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown c
items.description: A security flaw has been discovered in SourceCodester Online Book Store System 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file admin/login.php. The manipulation of the argument Username results in sql injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-15537 A security flaw has been discovered in SourceCodester Online Book
id: cd3c38da-fee4-5b03-a5f8-45bb84063e69
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-15537 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-15537
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/14
modified: 2026/07/14
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-15537 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-14T13:29:00Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-15537", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-15537 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8936401; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-12478 - Libsoup: incomplete fix for cve-2026-0716: out-of-bounds read in libsoup websocket frame processing (unmasked path)
items.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-12478
 
 Published : July 14, 2026, 10:16 a.m. | 24minutes ago
 
 Description : The fix for CVE-2026-0716 (commit 6ff7ef0, libsoup 3.6.6) placed the integer overflow guard inside the if (masked) block, leaving unmasked server-to-client frames unprotected. A malicious WebSocket server can send a crafted unmasked frame with a payload length near UINT64_MAX to trigger an OOB read in a libsoup-based client when max_incoming_payload_size is set to0.
 
 Severity: 4.8

        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3

falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12478 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-14T13:29:00Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-12478", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12478 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8690580; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: CVE-2026-15574: A flaw was found in the vllm-orchestrator-gateway component. The system's production binary logs all incoming authorizat
items.description: A flaw was found in the vllm-orchestrator-gateway component. The system's production binary logs all incoming authorization headers and full chat payloads, which may contain personally identifiable information (PII) and secrets, to persistent logs. This sensitive data, including bearer tokens and chat content, can be accessed by any user with logging privileges. This vulnerability leads to information disclosure, potentially allowing an attacker to harvest credentials and sensitive conversation content.

iocs.value: Shadow copy deletion: vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet
